seo.title: FlyBot | Fly Labs
seo.description: Describe a problem, get a real verdict. FlyBot has scored hundreds of ideas across {{questionCount}} questions and knows {{promptCount}} prompts by name. Free during beta.

landing.headline: An AI that already did the homework.
landing.description1: FlyBot sits on top of {{ideaCount}}+ scored ideas, {{promptCount}} prompts, and {{sourceCount}} live data sources. When you describe what you're building, it doesn't start from zero.
landing.description2: It tells you what it's already seen. Which similar ideas scored well. Where yours might break. And whether it's worth your weekend.
landing.problem1: You ask ChatGPT about your idea. It says "that sounds promising!" and gives you a list of next steps that could apply to literally anything.
landing.problem2: You ask FlyBot. It pulls up three similar ideas that already scored below 45. It flags that nobody in those markets was willing to pay. It finds a YC startup that tried the same angle and shut down in 18 months.
landing.problem3: Then it scores your idea anyway, because yours might be different. And it tells you exactly where it's different and where it's not.
landing.problemHighlight: Same question. Different answer. Because one of them has data.
landing.insideSubtitle: Every day, automated pipelines pull real problems from {{sourceCount}} sources and score them. That data lives inside FlyBot. When you bring your idea, it already has context.
landing.cap1Desc: From Reddit, Hacker News, GitHub, X, Product Hunt, the YC Graveyard, and more. Each one scored across 4 questions with a final verdict. FlyBot can search this database while you talk.
landing.cap2Desc: Is the problem real? Is there room for something new? Would people pay? Can you build it alone? Four questions, scored from different angles, combined into one honest verdict: BUILD, VALIDATE, or SKIP.
landing.cap3Desc: Need to write a landing page? There's a prompt for that. Want to structure a Substack post? FlyBot will name the specific prompt, explain why it fits, and quote the key instructions from it.
landing.cap4Desc: Are you only looking for evidence that agrees with you? Holding onto a project because you already spent three weekends on it? FlyBot spots the patterns that make smart people waste time on the wrong things.
landing.cap5Title: You built something. Now what do you say?
landing.cap5Desc: Most builders ship and then stare at a blank page. FlyBot has 12 title formulas, 5 article structures, and 7 hook patterns loaded. Tell it what you built and it helps you figure out how to talk about it.
landing.cap6Desc: The best ideas get validated against live discussions on X and Reddit. FlyBot knows which problems have real people actively complaining about them, and which ones are just theories.
landing.cap7Desc: Which industries are trending? Which sources produce the best ideas? Where do frameworks disagree? FlyBot has real-time analytics loaded and can surface patterns, hidden gems, and momentum shifts you'd miss scrolling through ideas manually.
landing.convoTitle: Three conversations that save you a weekend
landing.convo1Q: "I have an idea. Is it any good?"
landing.convo1A: Describe the problem you want to solve. FlyBot asks 4 questions about it, pulls similar ideas from the database, checks for dead startups that tried the same thing, and gives you a score with a BUILD, VALIDATE, or SKIP verdict. With per-pillar reasoning so you know exactly where the gaps are.
landing.convo2Q: "I need to write about what I'm building."
landing.convo2A: FlyBot has 12 title formulas, 5 article structures, and 7 hook patterns loaded. It can recommend specific prompts from the library by name and tell you which one fits your situation. It writes like a person talks, not like a marketing team writes.
landing.convo3Q: "I can't decide. I keep going back and forth."
landing.convo3A: This is where FlyBot is most useful. It will ask you why you keep going back to the first option (maybe you're just attached to it). It will score both ideas side by side. And it will show you where the data actually points, even if it's not the answer you wanted.
landing.exampleTitle: You type an idea. This comes back.
landing.exampleDesc1: FlyBot talks first. What looks strong, what's risky, what patterns it recognizes from similar problems. Then it drops the score card with per-framework breakdowns and a final verdict.
landing.exampleDesc2: The same scoring engine that runs the Ideas Lab, now in a conversation you can steer.
landing.exampleFooter: Real output from a FlyBot evaluation
landing.statsSubtitle: New ideas scored, new sources synced, new prompts added. These are live numbers.
landing.how1Desc: Describe a problem, paste an idea, ask for help with a post. Just talk naturally.
landing.how2Desc: Pulls similar ideas from the database. Matches prompts from the library. Asks the 4 scoring questions. Checks for dead startup overlaps.
landing.how3Desc: A score card, a verdict, per-pillar reasoning, and honest commentary. Then you decide what to do with it.
landing.transparency1: Powered by Claude (Anthropic). 10 free messages per account during beta. Your conversations are private and only visible to you.
landing.transparency2: Scores are AI opinions based on real data. Good opinions, but opinions. FlyBot helps solo builders decide what to build and how to talk about it. It won't give investment advice, do your homework, or pretend to be a therapist.
landing.transparency3: The entire platform is open source.
landing.ctaSubtitle: Bring an idea you're excited about. Or one you're not sure about. That's usually the more useful conversation.

chat.inputPlaceholder: Describe an idea, ask for prompts, or just talk...
chat.footerBeta: FlyBot is in beta and can make mistakes.
chat.disclosure: FlyBot is an AI assistant. Scores are opinions based on data. Always do your own research.

guest.emptyTitle: Try it. Describe a business idea.
guest.emptySubtitle: One free message. No signup needed.
guest.gateSubtext: Create a free account for 10 free messages.

disclosure.trigger: About FlyBot, limitations, and your data
disclosure.whatDesc1: FlyBot is an AI-powered vibe building partner, built on Claude (Anthropic). It helps solo builders think through ideas, content, and business decisions.
disclosure.whatDesc2: It's in beta. Responses can be inaccurate or incomplete. Always verify important information on your own.
disclosure.canTitle: What it does and doesn't do
disclosure.canDesc1: Scores business ideas using multiple AI-powered frameworks. Helps with content strategy, writing, and titles. Applies behavioral finance concepts to building decisions.
disclosure.canDesc2: It cannot help with: personal coaching, therapy, investment recommendations, medical or legal advice, general knowledge, or code debugging. Scores and verdicts are AI opinions, not guarantees.
disclosure.dataDesc1: Conversations are stored securely and are only visible to you. They're not shared with third parties or used to train AI models.
disclosure.dataDesc2: 10 free messages per account during beta. The full codebase is open source at github.com/fly-labs/website.

panel.title: FlyBot
panel.signInTitle: Sign in to chat with FlyBot
panel.signInDesc: Evaluate business ideas with AI scoring, get content strategy help, and think through building decisions. 10 free messages.
